title: An inflammation-targeted lipid nanoparticle inhibiting ferroptosis for spinal cord injury repair.
snippet: Erythropoietin (EPO) has been considered as a potentially effective drug candidate for the treatment of spinal cord injury (SCI). However, due to insufficient drug accumulation in the lesion site and systemic off-target effects, the clinical translation of EPO is limited. To overcome these limitations, we rationally designed a mannose-modified lipid nanopar...
